name: Monsuta
short_description: Vast action RPG bullet-hell where you take part in an adventure to defeat the evil Monsuta and restore peace to the world.
detailed_description:
With a world corrupted by the evil Monsuta, you must travel the land to find the six runes that seal Monsuta to cleanse the evil. Fight your way through multiple different biomes and environment while building your skills and talents. Gear up and enhance your power to become the hero to slay Monsuta and restore peace back into the world.

Key Features Include:

*Fast paced twin-stick combat.

*Collect and upgrade Relics to cast powerful spells.

*Find and enhance Badges to build your combat style that suits you.

*Purchase new weapons and armor with special stats and available upgrades.

*Explore a procedural generated world for a new experience every play.

*Randomly spawned caves to mine new material and explore for treasures.

*Complete temple trials and enhance your skills.

*Mine in randomly generated caves to collect resources.

*Participate in fishing and sell your catch.

*Over 50 side quests to complete.

*A large variety of biomes to explore and new enemies to overcome.

*Unlock new merchants to find 100+ new weapons, armor, and jewelry.
